top_signals.title: AMP Says Bonds No Longer a Hedge, Cuts From Some Pension Funds
top_signals.summary: AMP Ltd., one of Australia’s top asset managers, has ditched bonds from some of its retirement funds with sovereign debt no longer offering the diversification investors have relied on for decades as a ballast against stock volatility.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Gold slump tests Chinese brand Laopu's resilience as luxury upstart
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
